details.brokersummary:
Welcome to 2718 Church Avenue, a beacon of luxury nestled at the intersection of PLG and Flatbush, Brooklyn. This one bedroom, one bathroom residence is thoughtfully designed to provide the ultimate in comfort and convenience. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows flood the spacious interiors with natural light, and designer finishes create an atmosphere of understated elegance.
Situated just steps from the 2 & 5 train, 2718 Church Ave is just moments from all that Brooklyn has to offer. Our unique amenities offer a complete lifestyle package, designed to feel like a warm extension of each home. Additionally, the building?s proximity to Prospect Park offers endless recreational opportunities.
Amenities include: + Recreational Lounge + Generous Co-working space with Wifi + Furnished Rooftop Terrace + Fully Equipped Fitness Center + Package Room + Secure Bike Room + Yoga Room + Parking Available + Washer/Dryer in Each Residence

Welcome to 2718 Church Avenue, a beacon of luxury nestled at the intersection of PLG and Flatbush, Brooklyn. This one bedroom, one bathroom residence is thoughtfully designed to provide the ultimate in comfort and convenience. Expansive floor-to-ceiling windows flood the spacious interiors with natural light, and designer finishes create an atmosphere of understated elegance.
Situated just steps from the 2 & 5 train, 2718 Church Ave is just moments from all that Brooklyn has to offer. Our unique amenities offer a complete lifestyle package, designed to feel like a warm extension of each home. Additionally, the building?s proximity to Prospect Park offers endless recreational opportunities.
Amenities include: + Recreational Lounge + Generous Co-working space with Wifi + Furnished Rooftop Terrace + Fully Equipped Fitness Center + Package Room + Secure Bike Room + Yoga Room + Parking Available + Washer/Dryer in Each Residence

1.5 bed 1 bath in gorgeous area of Crown Heights
- Elevator building - Newly renovated - Huge bedroom - Big living area with window - On-site super - Stainless steel appliances
Available July 1st Small pets OK

Virtual Tour Available! Beautiful 1.5 BR/1bath apartment in fabulous Bushwick!This apartment is in the pindrop-quiet "rear" building of this unique courtyard complex! It's like your own little treehouse in the middle of Bushwick. You'll be right around the corner from dozens of top-rated bars, restaurants, cafes, grocers, and music/art venues. Local favorites include Mominette, Sea Wolf, Three Diamond Door, Precious Metal, The Rookery, Archie's, Heavy Woods, Idlewild, Clara's, Yours Sincerely, Chuko, Los Hermanos, Wheelhouse.No brokers fee!Only First & SecurityContact to schedule your appointment today!

Welcome to 487 Keap, a brand new rental building seconds to Metropolitan/Union Avenue L train Very well maintained ? beautiful common areas including a landscaped roof deck with lounge chairs, bar, and outdoor shower. Full service and spacious gym, bike and additional storage are available.
This apartment is rent stabilized, you can enjoy a rent stabilized home, be protected from sharp increases in rent and have the right to renew your lease for years to come.

The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus & Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops & F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

Studio in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

Studio in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

No Fee ? Luxury 1 Bed / 1 Bath in Brand New Elevator Building in Clinton Hill!
Modern design meets prime location in this spacious 1-bedroom, 1 bath apartment featuring hardwood floors, high ceilings, central A/C, and a private balcony. The open layout is perfect for entertaining, and each bedroom offers great light and flexibility.
Enjoy top-notch amenities including: ? Elevator ? Gym ? Lounge & Game Room ? Shared Workspace & Public Wifi ? Laundry Room & Bike Storage ? Furnished Rooftop with Skyline Views ? Courtyard & Outdoor Spaces ? Dishwasher, Eat-In Kitchen, Stainless Steel Appliances
Just 1 block from the Franklin Ave C/S trains?15 minutes to Manhattan. Close to Outpost, Doris, Sisters, and other local favorites.
First & Security Only | No Fee | Pets on Approval
Updated 2-bedroom apartment with a private terrace. Features include central air, a dishwasher, and laundry in the building. Email to schedule a showing.

Welcome to The Elliot, a contemporary residential building designed for comfortable modern living. The building features stylish common areas, quality finishes, and a strong amenity package for residents to enjoy.
BUILDING AMENITIES ? Sauna ? Yoga studio ? Film studio ? Modern lobby and common areas ? Elevator ? Package room ? Laundry room ? Bike storage
UNIT FEATURES ? Modern finishes ? Updated kitchen ? Stainless steel appliances ? Hardwood flooring ? Ample closet space ? Large windows ? Plenty of natural light

UNIT FEATURES ? Modern finishes ? Updated kitchen ? Stainless steel appliances ? Hardwood flooring ? Ample closet space ? Large windows ? Plenty of natural light

The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus & Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops & F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

Spacious 3.5-Bed, 2.5-Bath at 585/589 Knickerbocker ? Available July st
Bright and modern three-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment in a new building, just a short walk to Myrtle-Wyckoff (L/M). Surrounded by parks, shops, and dining options.
The unit features windows throughout for great natural light, in-unit laundry, and access to building amenities including a rooftop, gym, bike storage, and more.

Spacious 2BR in a modern elevator building with one of the biggest living rooms you?ll find?room for dining, lounging, and working. Bright and airy with oversized windows, a large kitchen, great storage, and in-unit washer/dryer. A/C in every room, big closets, sunny bedroom.
Building perks: gym, roof deck, pet spa, parking (for a fee), lounge, bike storage. No broker fee.

Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.

📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

The Baltic Canal ? Modern Living in Boerum Hill
Studios, 1- & 2-BR homes with oversized windows, white oak floors, custom kitchens, spa-style baths, and in-unit or on-site laundry. Select residences offer private balconies or terraces.
Amenities: Bike room, elevator, package room, gym, media room, and multiple outdoor spaces ? deck, garden, patio & panoramic roof deck.
Unbeatable location at the crossroads of Boerum Hill, Gowanus & Park Slope, near Whole Foods, top restaurants, boutique shops & F/G/R trains.
📅 Schedule your tour today and make The Baltic Canal your next home.

Bright & Versatile 2.5BR / 1.5BA Duplex with Outdoor Space in Bushwick
Located on a quiet, tree-lined street in the heart of Bushwick, this unique duplex apartment offers tons of space and flexibility just moments from the L and M trains at DeKalb and Knickerbocker.
Upstairs you?ll find two sunny bedrooms, a full modern bathroom, and a renovated kitchen with stainless steel appliances and a dishwasher. The lower level opens into a huge bonus space with a private half bath?great for a studio setup, extra living area, or workspace.
Details like exposed brick, hardwood floors, and high ceilings give this home its charm, while a shared backyard adds room to unwind or entertain outdoors.
Features:
Spacious duplex layout
Exposed brick & hardwood floors
High ceilings
Renovated kitchen w/ dishwasher
Bonus lower level w/ half bath
Shared backyard
Pets case by case

Experience Brooklyn living at 1010 Pacific St. You?ll find this community in the Prospect Heights area of Brooklyn. Experience a new standard at 1010 Pacific St.
Pacific House offers a collection of Studio, 1 and 2 Bedroom luxury apartments featuring expansive, open- concept layouts, oak floors and contemporary finishes. Residents also enjoy unparalleled access to first-class amenities, including fitness center, dedicated kids? areas, media lounge and bar and an expansive roof top with view of the city. Pacific House is centrally located in the heart of Brooklyn?s trendy prospect park neighborhood, and in close proximity to major transit hubs and an array of local amenities. Nearby shops, restaurants, schools, outdoor parks, neighborhood services, arts and culture are all within easy reach.

Experience Brooklyn living at 1010 Pacific St. You?ll find this community in the Prospect Heights area of Brooklyn. Experience a new standard at 1010 Pacific St.
Pacific House offers a collection of Studio, 1 and 2 Bedroom luxury apartments featuring expansive, open- concept layouts, oak floors and contemporary finishes. Residents also enjoy unparalleled access to first-class amenities, including fitness center, dedicated kids? areas, media lounge and bar and an expansive roof top with view of the city. Pacific House is centrally located in the heart of Brooklyn?s trendy prospect park neighborhood, and in close proximity to major transit hubs and an array of local amenities. Nearby shops, restaurants, schools, outdoor parks, neighborhood services, arts and culture are all within easy reach.

Pacific House offers a collection of Studio, 1 and 2 Bedroom luxury apartments featuring expansive, open- concept layouts, oak floors and contemporary finishes. Residents also enjoy unparalleled access to first-class amenities, including fitness center, dedicated kids? areas, media lounge and bar and an expansive roof top with view of the city. Pacific House is centrally located in the heart of Brooklyn?s trendy prospect park neighborhood, and in close proximity to major transit hubs and an array of local amenities. Nearby shops, restaurants, schools, outdoor parks, neighborhood services, arts and culture are all within easy reach.

77 Commercial is a new landmark on the north edge of the Greenpoint, Brooklyn waterfront, situated between two great outdoor spaces ? a beautiful, lushly landscaped inner court to the east, and the long anticipated Box Street Park to the west.
Discover a range of living spaces tailored to your needs, including studios, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom layouts.
Apartment Features: -Expansive living areas boasting breathtaking views -Fully equipped kitchens with stainless steel appliances -Dishwasher -In-unit washer/dryer for added convenience -Individual AC/Heat units -Big windows inviting abundant natural light -Soaring high ceilings and elegant hardwood floors
Building Amenities: -State-of-the-art fitness center -Relaxing sauna -Basketball and tennis courts -Inviting indoor pool with direct access to outdoor pool deck -Multiple BBQ grilling areas -Rooftop retreat offering panoramic views -Residents lounge and versatile working space -Entertainment-filled recreation room -Secure bicycle storage -Convenient elevators -Parking garage available (additional fee applies)
Location: Enjoy seamless access to the new esplanade and ferry terminal, ensuring swift commutes to Manhattan.

Discover a range of living spaces tailored to your needs, including studios, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, and 3-bedroom layouts.

Beautiful 1 Bedroom Near Prospect Park
Located just steps from Prospect Park, this bright and modern 1-bedroom offers comfort, style, and convenience in one of Brooklyn?s most sought-after areas.
Apartment Features: ? Floor-to-ceiling windows ? Modern kitchen with cabinet lighting ? Stainless steel appliances ? Spacious closets ? Excellent natural light ? Fully tiled bathroom with deep soaking tub
Building Amenities: ? Gym ? Roof deck with city views ? Recreation/lounge area ? Bike storage ? Laundry in building ? Pet-friendly Surrounded by cafes, restaurants, shopping, and neighborhood favorites ? all with Prospect Park right nearby.
Transit Nearby: B/Q at Parkside Ave B/Q at Church Ave B/Q/S at Prospect Park 2/5 at Church Ave

Studio in Prime Crown Heights
Bright space with high ceilings, hardwood floors, stone countertops, stainless steel appliances, and a modern marble-style bathroom.
Laundry in building ? Secure entry & package system
Steps to Nostrand Ave 2/3/4/5/S trains, parks, dining & shopping.
Pet-friendly ? Guarantors welcome

2 Bed / 2 Bath duplex at 677 Quincy St - Unit: 4L in Bed-Stuy, Brooklyn. Pets Upon Approval. Nearby subway stations include: Kosciuszko St (J). Deal Deal Deal! HUGE and spacious 3 bedroom apartment. Large open kitchen living room with beautiful exposed brick walls. 2 King sized bedrooms with bay windows and decent sized closed. One queen size bedroom with closet. Unit located on the 4th floor of a walkup. Lots of natural sunlight throughout. Laundry in building.
AMENITIES Hardwood floors Eat In Kitchen Stainless Steel Appliances Small dogs ok Cats ok Hardwood Floors Laundry in building

Luxury 2 bedroom / 1 Bath in Prime CROWN HEIGHTS! Unit features: Tons of natural Sun light, super High ceilings, gourmet kitchen, DISHWASHER, stainless steel appliances, Stone countertops , Central Air, strip hardwood flooring, State of of the art bathroom with deep bathtub (Marble Style) and so much more!!
Just a few minutes walk from Nostrand ave 3,4,5, S, Train Station , 2 Minutes walk from Beautiful Parks!
Close to many restaurants, groceries, shopping, bars & exciting Parks.
Building Features: Intercom systems, Shared ROOFTOP Space, Backyard space, Laundry room in building, security systems & Safe Delivery package drop offs !
Guarantors are welcome!
Virtual/ in person showings available
This is a pet-friendly apartment building
Schedule now to view!

Luxury, brand-new 2br/2bth in the heart of Brooklyn with abundant natural light and in-unit washer/dryer, plus amenities including a gym, bike room, package room, parking, roof deck, and co-working space.
Prime Crown Heights 1 bedroom with private outdoor terrace, strong natural light, ample closet space, central air, and laundry in building.

Welcome to 1326 Ocean Ave Studios ? 1-Bed ? 2-Bed Apartments in Prime Midwood / Ditmas Park
Spacious, well-designed residences featuring high ceilings, large kitchens with dishwashers, and excellent closet space. Select units offer private balconies, and all layouts are designed to comfortably accommodate modern living.
Apartment Features
High ceilings
Large kitchens
Dishwasher
Queen-size bedroom layouts
Ample closet space
Private balconies (select units)
Building Amenities
Gym
Rooftop
Lounge
Game room
Bike storage
Laundry room
Conveniently located near shops, dining, and transportation.

NO FEE! Bright & Spacious 1BR ? Newly Built
? Tons of natural light + high ceilings ? Open living/dining layout ? Stainless steel kitchen + dishwasher ? Stone countertops + hardwood floors ? Modern marble-style bathroom
Building: ? Laundry room ? Rooftop + backyard access ? Secure entry + package area ? Pet-friendly
Location: ? 5 min to Q train (Cortelyou Rd) ? Near top bars, restaurants, cafes & parks
Virtual & in-person tours available ? contact to schedule!

Brand New Modern Luxury Building ? Full Amenities
Beautifully designed residences featuring:
? Hardwood floors throughout ? High ceilings & great natural light ? Generous closet space ? Private outdoor terrace ? perfect for relaxing or entertaining ? Gourmet kitchen with marble island & stainless steel appliances ? Dishwasher included ? Sleek modern bathroom with deep soaking tub ? Central heating & A/C ? Video intercom system
Building Amenities:
? Fully equipped gym ? Resident lounge ? Game room ? Co-working space ? Laundry room ? Bike storage ? Package room ? Rooftop with stunning views ? Private parking available
Only a 3-minute walk to the B & Q trains at E 16th St / Ave M
Guarantors welcome.
Reach out to schedule a tour.

Luxury 1-bedroom / 1.5-bath duplex in a brand-new building in prime Bed-Stuy / Clinton Hill. Features high ceilings, a modern kitchen with stainless steel appliances, in-unit washer/dryer, central A/C, hardwood floors, a marble-style bath with soaking tub, and backyard access.
Guarantors welcome. 6-minute walk to the Nostrand Ave A/C express.
Virtual or in-person showings available ? schedule today.

Welcome to 680 East 21st Street ? Ditmas Park
Brand new elevator building on a quiet, tree-lined block. Each unit offers large bedrooms plus a home office, a modern kitchen with high-end appliances, and a private balcony.
Features include: ? Spacious layout with great closet space ? Bright living areas with tons of natural light ? Hardwood floors throughout ? Split A/C units in every room
Building amenities: ? Furnished rooftop & outdoor space ? Laundry room
Available now?reach out to schedule a viewing.

To qualify for this 2-bedroom:
?? ?Household income must be between $144,000 ? $168,000 annually ?? ?Total household assets must not exceed $200,000
Brand-new luxury residences now leasing at 1800 Ocean Ave ? offering studios, 1-bedroom & 2-bedroom layouts in a full-service building.
Apartment Features: ? Private balconies (select units) ? Modern kitchens & bathrooms ? Dishwasher + built-in microwave ? Spacious layouts with great closet space ? Central A/C & heat ? Excellent natural light ? Video intercom ? Pet friendly
Building Amenities: ? Fitness center ? Laundry room ? Resident lounge & game room ? Co-working space ? Package room ? Rooftop with open views ? Bike storage ? On-site parking
Conveniently located near Avenue M / E 16th St (B & Q trains).
Guarantors welcome. Schedule a tour today!

Modern 1 & 2 bedroom residences in a full-service building steps from Prospect Park.
Bright, well-designed apartments feature large windows, stainless steel appliances, marble bathrooms, and in-unit washer/dryers. Select homes include private balconies.
Building Amenities ? Rooftop with grills & seating ? Fitness center ? Co-working lounge ? Landscaped courtyard ? Dog run ? Bike storage & parking available
Set in the heart of Prospect Lefferts Gardens near Prospect Park, local dining, shopping, and multiple subway lines for an easy commute

Beautifully designed, spacious 1-bedroom duplex with a large open basement. This home features central heat and A/C, exposed brick throughout, hardwood floors, and generous closet space. The sunny bedroom highlights a striking exposed brick wall, while the modern kitchen offers ample room to cook and entertain.
Building amenities include laundry on site and a shared backyard. Located in vibrant Bed-Stuy, just a short walk to the Gates Ave (J/M/Z) and Utica Ave (A/C) trains.
Excellent deal on a 2-bedroom apartment just steps from Church Ave station. Laundry in building and roof access included. Reach out today for a showing!

Affordable Housing Unit ? Income Requirements Apply
To qualify for this 2-bedroom:
?? ?Household income must be between $144,000 ? $168,000 annually ?? ?Total household assets must not exceed $200,000

Reach out to schedule a tour.

With Atlantic Ave and Eastern Pkwy right outside your door, you?ll have everything you could need just a stones throw away. Enjoy the old school vibe of Ocean Hill (Brooklyn?s oldest neighorhood!) with new school conveniences of this beautifully renovated building! You CAN have it both ways and we can help you get it :)
Conveniently located off the A, C, 2, 3, and 4 trains as well as the B15, B45, B46, and B65 bus lines.
ENJOY: Central A/C and Heat Outdoor Spaces Laundry in the Building Pet Friendly

Amazing location blocks from Prospect Park in Prospect Lefferts Gardens. Feel the history of Brooklyn on brownstone-lined streets and in locally owned bars, restaurants, coffee shops and more. Not only will you have the chance for somewhat of a city escape, but you will still have everything you need around you with full size grocers, pharmacies, bodegas, liquor stores, retail shops, tattoo shops, whatever your heart desires! You won?t be miss out on any luxuries inside your new home at The Ballgreen Complex either! Fully equipped with all a renter could need in NYC. Come on by and take a look with us!
Conveniently located off the 2, 5, and Q trains, as well as the B12, B35, B44, and B49 bus lines.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Central A/C and Heat Excellent light from extra large windows
BUILDING FEATURES: Elevator Fitness Center Laundry Room Tenant Lounge Finished Roof Deck Parking (by availability) Virtual Doorman

NEW building!! That means new finishes, new appliances, everything fresh and clean just for you! With everything you could need right outside your door on Eastern Parkway! Grocers, restaurants, bars, locally owned shops/businesses? This is an historic Brooklyn neighborhood that will make you feel right at home Conveniently located off the 2, 3, and 4 trains as well as the B7, B12, B14, B15, and B47 bus lines.
FEATURES: Central A/C and Heat Outdoor Spaces Laundry in the Building Pet Friendly

Spacious new development 1-bedroom apartment in a prime Bed-Stuy location, just moments from Herbert Von King Park and one block from the Nostrand Ave G train.
Apartment Features:
Large 1-bedroom layout Private balcony Washer/dryer in unit Stainless steel appliances Great storage space Modern finishes throughout
Building Features:
Roof access Pet friendly Guarantors welcome
Great location near parks, caf?s, restaurants, and easy transportation.

Welcome to 42 Southgate Ct in the heart of Gravesend, Brooklyn. This peaceful neighborhood offers a close-knit vibe with easy access to shopping, dining, and entertainment?all just minutes from your door.
This updated 2-bedroom, 1-bath home features:
In-unit washer and dryer
High ceilings
Stainless steel appliances
Microwave
Open-concept kitchen
Private outdoor space
Conveniently located near the F train for a quick commute.

Duplex unit with a backyard! Three bedrooms upstairs + finished downstairs space. High ceilings, hardwood floors, recessed lighting, open concept living room and modern kitchen with stainless steel appliances, sunny windows, 1.5 baths, and a huge backyard, shared only with the other unit on the first floor! Prime Williamsburg block - close to cafes, restaurants, bars, grocery stores, retail, and around the corner from the Lorimer L & G trains make it a 20 min commute to Union Square.

MASSIVE TRUE 2 BEDROOM
- 2 huge bedrooms (on opposite sides) - Skylights - Giant living area - Stainless steel kitchen - Hot water included
Great location - Cuts & Slices Pizza, Twin Grills, Toad Style Vegan, Krumb Snackerz, Caroline's Donuts, Weng's Garden, etc nearby
7/1 move in Small pets OK No broker fee

MASSIVE TRUE 2 BEDROOM PLUS BASEMENT
- 2 huge bedrooms (on opposite sides) - Nice living area - Big finished basement - Stainless steel kitchen - Hot water included
Great location - Cuts & Slices Pizza, Twin Grills, Toad Style Vegan, Krumb Snackerz, Caroline's Donuts, Weng's Garden, etc nearby
8/1 move in Cats OK, sorry no dogs

Gorgeous 2.5 bedroom apartment in Crown Heights!
This apartment is located steps away from St. John's park and Recreation center, four blocks away from the Eastern Parkway 2,3,4,5 train at Utica ave, and is on a quiet tree lined block.
The apartment features a spacious living room with and open kitchen, beautiful hardwood floors, and three good size bedrooms.
Call or text Today!

New development!
Incredible, modern, trenched in sunlight new building at 923 Broadway in Bushwick, Brooklyn!
The units feature - W/D in unit - Dishwasher - Central AC - Balconies (floors 3 and up) - Tons of natural light
Shared roof deck for the building.
Prime location, right on the Bushwick/Bed Stuy border, just moments to JMZ trains. Local favorites include: Birdy's Bar, Santa Panza Italian, Marco's Bar, drip coffee makers cafe, Rebecca's Bar, The Looking Glass, Maria Hernandez Park, and much much more.
No broker fee 8/1 move in Cats welcome

No Fee | Full-Floor 3 Bed in Prime Harlem
Spacious top-floor (walk-up) 3 bedroom offering over 1,000 sq ft with a classic NYC layout and high ceilings. Bright, sun-filled living space throughout.
Apartment Features:
Stainless steel appliances Dishwasher In-unit washer/dryer (to be installed) Granite countertops Generous bedroom sizes
Building / Details:
Heat & hot water included Potential for central A/C in the future
Located on 129th St near multiple subway lines (A/C, B/D, 4/5/6) with easy access to the Apollo Theater, Whole Foods, Trader Joe?s, and neighborhood favorites.
Available for showings now ? message to schedule.

Gorgeous Duplex off Broadway Junction ACE L JZ Trains! Two floors of a private home including a Private Yard and in Unit Laundry!
This apartment has Heat and Hot water included and you only pay for electricity.
Upstairs is a King Sized bedroom and a Full Sized Bedroom with entrance to yard. Downstairs has two large living room areas and access to the yard also.
You can get to Bushwick and Bed Stuy in minutes. A lot of shopping and supermarkets, cafes in the area! Pets okay. Please Text me today!

Discover your new home at 31-19 37th St, where comfort and style meet in perfect harmony. This stunning industrial-chic apartment offers two sunlit bedrooms and a large private patio in a building filled with modern amenities. Experience the charm of historic Astoria while enjoying conveniences such as an elevator, a laundry room, a residents' lounge, and a fully furnished rooftop with breathtaking views of the Manhattan skyline. With easy access to the N/Q lines at Broadway and the R/M lines at Steinway, you'll be just 20 minutes away from Midtown.

Prime Crown Heights Living at 1499 Bedford Ave!
Discover the epitome of modern living at 1499 Bedford Ave, a new building in the heart of Crown Heights. Located steps from Eastern Parkway and multiple subway lines, and within walking distance of Grand Army Plaza, Brooklyn Botanical Gardens, and Prospect Park, this residence offers unparalleled convenience and vibrant city life.
Building Amenities:
State-of-the-art fitness room Pet wash station Laundry facilities (in-unit laundry in some units) Social lounge with game room Furnished rooftop with panoramic city views Second-floor public terrace Open workstations Dedicated mail room
Unit Features: Private terraces and balconies in select units Kitchen islands in select units Large windows with abundant natural light Stunning views of NYC skyline, Prospect Park, and neighborhood streets
Welcome to 1499 Bedford Ave?where luxury, community, and convenience meet. Experience the best of Crown Heights living.

Welcome to Ridgewoods most luxury building! Each apartment features stainless steel appliances, glossy dark hardwood floors, high ceilings, and plenty of natural sunlight. The building is complete with on site laundry, and plenty of great outdoor common areas including a rooftop with sweeping skyline views. Cancel that gym membership as well because you have your own right on site! Available 24/7 : NO FEE (More photos coming soon) Don?t miss this!!
Hardwood Floors Central A/C Stainless Steel Appliances Gym Laundry in building Outdoor Space Roof access High Ceilings Video Intercom Dishwasher Built in microwave Stone countertops Bike storage Natural Light in Living Area
Call or text to schedule a viewing! Thanks! :)

Nestled right between BedStuy and Crown Heights, this location offers the amazing old school vibe of Brooklyn AND the new luxury of of one of the quickest growing and most popular neighborhoods today. With all the conveniences of Atlantic Avenue around the corner and Franklin Avenue just down the street, you'll have everything you need nearby.
Conveniently off the A,C and LIRR trains as well as the B25, B43, and B44 bus routes.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Dishwasher and Microwave Central A/C and Heat Excellent light from extra large windows
BUILDING FEATURES: Bike Room Elevator Fitness Center Laundry Room Finished Roof Deck Parking (by availability)

PRIME Bushwick location right by Maria Hernandez Park! Right outside your door, you can find an actual full size grocer (I know, right?), countless bodegas, coffee shops, bars, restaurants, locally owned businesses, thrift and antique shops, music and dance venues? the list goes on and on! You?ll never find yourself bored around here and for those days where you don?t feel like being out, you?ll have a pretty sweet building to stay in as well. Conveniently located off the L and M trains, as well as the B38, B57, and B60 bus lines.
UNIT FEATURES: Hardwood Floors Stainless Steel Kitchen Dishwasher and Microwave Central A/C and Heat Private Balcony Shared Backyard Laundry Room
Pet Friendly! First & Security NO FEE
